code.text: Coagulation

text.div:
Coagulation

Test13-MAR-2021Reference RangeUnit
Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma0.50 - 0.5ug/mL
Prothrombin time (PT)10.4 L11.0 - 13.0s
INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay2.2 H0.9 - 1.2{INR}

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows marked hypoxemia, mild anemia, leukopenia with neutropenia and lymphopenia, mild thrombocytopenia, elevated bilirubin, creatinine, ferritin, CRP, INR, and D-dimer, with low total protein. These findings suggest acute or chronic hypoxic and inflammatory processes, possible liver dysfunction, impaired renal function, and increased risk of bleeding. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are strongly recommended.
